data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 6 advisory). Remediation: (A) NAME the production path (adv #2): INBOUND leg = FakeAcliClient(read) -> fetcher.compute_snapshot -> inbound_differ.compute_inbound_mutations; OUTBOUND leg = outbound_differ.compute_outbound_mutations -> batch_dispatch.update_one with a RECORDING WRITE client (asserts add_comment/set_relationship/set_parent). (B) MECHANISM GAP (adv #4, correct): the fake exposes only read surfaces, so the OUTBOUND leg uses a recording write-client through the production applier — the round-trip is inbound-read-path + outbound-write-path composed. (C) ROUND-TRIP = convergence: with REAL story-A fixtures, when local mirrors Jira's comment/link/parent BOTH differs emit nothing (fixed point, no oscillation); when one side lacks it, the right direction emits the add. (D) DISTINCT from test_reconcile_roundtrip.py (adv #5/#6): that harness uses HAND-BUILT mock fixtures + scalar fields; F uses the HONEST captured fixtures (story A) and covers comments/issue-links(both directions)/parent — the exact seam class. (E) PROBE AUDIT (adv #3): grep of scripts/jira-pressure-test/*.sh for NOT-SYNCED/as-expected/known-gap finds exactly ONE encoded-bug guard (e2e_field_validation_probe.sh inbound-comments-gap @1543-1547 + legend @1914); issuetype/status are legitimate LOCAL-WINS, not bugs. That one guard is flipped to fail-when-the-gap-reopens (bug 0ee6 closed). Live variant documented + opt-in.
